name: fixit-pr3
description: FixIt — on-demand local home-services marketplace (PR3 full-stack)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
